step_by_step_thinking:
```
I agree with the previous assessment. The key characteristic here—the ability to move when the tongue extends—defines a ranula uniquely among these cysts because it is directly related to its connection via the sublingual duct to the submandibular salivary glands.

Answer Choice: C Ranula.
```
